privileged_info_summary: The task 'set_meeting_password@1' involves setting a password on a Jitsi Meet conference room running at http://localhost:8080. The target room is 'premium-yoga-class' and the password to be set is 'FlowState24'. All metadata claims have been independently verified against the setup scripts, Docker configuration, and verifier logic. The entire environment is synthetic, running on Docker containers with a local Jitsi Meet instance (version stable-9753).
